criterionResults.evidence: InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:31-38 — Component has proper props interface (InteractionReviewPanelProps) and renders successfully in all 11 tests
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:106 — Loading state with data-testid='state-loading' present during API fetch; verified by test at line 49-52
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:127 — No-interactions state with data-testid='state-no-interactions' present when issues array is empty; verified by test at line 54-60
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:188 — Minor state with data-testid='state-minor' present for low/moderate severity; verified by test at line 62-91
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:137 — Critical state with data-testid='state-critical' present for high severity; Acknowledge button absent (only Override present); verified by test at line 93-113
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:113 — API error state with data-testid='state-api-error' present on rejection; verified by test at line 115-123
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:226 — Acknowledge button calls onAcknowledge(issues!); verified by test at line 125-149
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:136,177-181 — Override button disabled until overrideReason.length >= 10, then calls onOverride(issues!, overrideReason); verified by tests at line 151-177 and 179-204

InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:5,35 — Component correctly accepts drugInteractionApi via props (line 35), imports only the TYPE (line 5), no hardcoded URLs found. HOWEVER: The type definition file 'src/types/drugInteractionApi.ts' exists locally but is UNTRACKED in git (git status shows '?? src/types/'). This file is not included in the commit, so the PR would break the build after merge.

InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:151,154,158,159,162,201,210,213,214,217 — All FHIR resource accesses use optional chaining (?.) and nullish coalescing (??): issue.code?.coding?.[0]?.display, issue.severity ?? 'low', issue.detail ?? 'No...', issue.implicated?.map(ref => ref.display ?? ref.reference)

InteractionReviewPanel.test.tsx:49-263 — 11 tests total (exceeds 8 minimum): 5 state tests (loading, no-interactions, minor, critical, api-error) + acknowledge + override disabled/enabled + override callback + involved medications + severity badges + missing severity handling
InteractionReviewPanel.tsx:31,233 — Both exports present: named export (line 31: 'export function InteractionReviewPanel') and default export (line 233: 'export default InteractionReviewPanel')

comments: The implementation is nearly complete with excellent test coverage (11/11 passing) and proper null-safe FHIR access patterns. However, AC9 is only partially satisfied because the critical type definition file 'src/types/drugInteractionApi.ts' was created but not staged for commit (git status shows '?? src/types/'). The component and tests import from this file, so merging the PR as-is would break the build. The implementer must add this file to git before the PR can be approved. Once that single file is staged, all acceptance criteria will be met.
